filter.axisQuery:
WITH UserRoles AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN EXISTS (
            -- VIP user
            SELECT 1 FROM Core.[User] CU
            WHERE CU.ID = @currentUser
              AND CU.Code IN ('nguyensythanh', 'buikhanhtiep','nguyenkimanh')

            UNION ALL

            -- Department Admin
            SELECT 1
            FROM Core.Membership M
                     JOIN Core.Department D ON D.ID = M.DepartmentId
                     JOIN Core.Role R ON R.ID = M.RoleId
            WHERE M.UserId = @currentUser
              AND D.Code = 'DEPTS-10000'
              AND R.Code = 'ROLES-10000'
        ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsSuperUser
)
-- Danh sách user
SELECT
    CAST(U.FullName AS NVARCHAR(200)) AS label,
    CAST(U.ID AS NVARCHAR(36)) AS value
FROM Core.[User] U
         CROSS JOIN UserRoles UR
WHERE
    U.ID NOT IN (
                 '4EDCE3A5-898E-46E1-9812-11FE5B8A16BC',
                 '87C834D8-7329-4F75-92B8-12D2ED24B5D9',
      '1C7C9420-C3E5-4287-A0DB-9347B13AA2F4'
        )
  AND U.IsActive = 1
  AND (
    -- SuperUser → thấy hết
    UR.IsSuperUser = 1

        -- User thường → thấy mình + cấp dưới
        OR (UR.IsSuperUser = 0 AND (U.ID = @currentUser OR U.DirectManagerId = @currentUser))
    )

UNION ALL

-- Dòng ALL nếu là SuperUser
SELECT 'All', 'ALL'
FROM UserRoles UR
WHERE UR.IsSuperUser = 1

ORDER BY label
filter.label: User

filter.axisQuery:
SELECT
    CAST(y AS NVARCHAR(4)) AS label,
    CAST(y AS NVARCHAR(4)) AS value
FROM (
         SELECT YEAR = (YEAR(GETDATE()) - 10) + number
         FROM master..spt_values
         WHERE type = 'P'
           AND number BETWEEN 0 AND ( (YEAR(GETDATE()) + 5) - (YEAR(GETDATE()) - 10) )
     ) AS t(y)
ORDER BY value DESC
filter.label: Year
